_meta.scaffoldNote: Forward-looking strategic domain. Architecture, algorithm, and avatar persona spec to be uploaded once initial product brief is approved.

knowledgeBase.content: Strategic vision: LinkedIn-style platform for global hospitality / cruise / J-1 / labor-import workforce. Core: continuous candidate-host matching, AI-avatar concierge, geographic focus on Southeast Asia + traditional source countries. Technical architecture pending product brief approval.

Seven avatar personas defined: Marcus Maven, Max Mind, Eli GPT, Julian Claude, Bruce Lee, Gabrielle Paige, Alex Lynne. Each persona has a defined voice, role, and use case. Detailed persona spec, voice profile, and visual standard to be uploaded.

knowledgeBase.topic: Job Matching Algorithm & Continuous Placement Logic
knowledgeBase.content: Continuous-placement model: candidates remain in pool post-placement; algorithm re-matches as new opportunities arise. Algorithm design pending product brief.

Primary: Southeast Asia (hospitality, cruise crew, labor import). Secondary: existing source countries (Brazil, China, Thailand, Indonesia, Mexico, South Africa, Uzbekistan). Expansion criteria pending strategic review.
Standardized profile schema (work history, certifications, language proficiency, MLC/J-1 eligibility flags) pending design review.

rules.if: Decision commits resources or partner relationships

rules.then: Document findings; queue for Robert review

decisionTrees.trigger: AI avatar / persona content generated for external use

dataSources.name: Avatar persona library (Synthesia / HeyGen / Aragon — no MCP)
